name: insertPerson
description: Inserts a Google Docs person smart chip at a specific paragraph location using an email address.

documentId.description: The document ID — the long string between /d/ and /edit in a Google Docs URL.

index.description: 1-based character index within an existing paragraph where the person chip should be inserted.

email.description: Email address linked to the person smart chip.

name.description: Optional display name hint when Google Docs resolves the person mention.
